title: CANON EOS 2000D DSLR Camera with EF-S 18-55 mm f/3.5-5.6 III & EF 75-300 mm f/4-5.6 III Lens
subtitle: CANON EOS 2000D DSLR
overview: Tricky lighting? Busy scene? It's no problem with the Canon EOS 2000D DSLR in your hand. You've got a 24.1-megapixel sensor to play around with – in fact, the sensor is around 19 x bigger than the sort you'd find in your average smartphone. Because it captures lots of light, your images and videos will be packed with detail. title: CANON EOS R100 Mirrorless Camera with RF-S 18-45 mm f/4.5-6.3 IS STM Lens
subtitle: CANON EOS R100 Mirrorless
overview: The EOS R100 is a great first step into the world of filmmaking and photography. It's light and compact, so it can go wherever you go without getting in the way. Perfect for discrete vlogging or event photography. The APS-C sensor captures plenty of light and detail, which means you'll have 24.1 MP photos and 4K videos. And to make sure they are pin-sharp, the Dual Pixel CMOS Auto Focus detects and tracks the person in the frame for perfect focus. Which lets you focus on getting the best shot.  Good to know  - It can capture bursts of up to 6.5 fps - then it's just a case of picking the best photo - Powered by the DIGIC 8 processor, the camera is quick to focus and take the shot - Built-in WiFi makes it easy to transfer photos to your phone and shoot remotely - Use guide mode to learn the ropes, or get stuck in with customisable controls - A maximum ISO of 12,800 helps capture more detail and less noise in dark scenes - The all-purpose 18-45 mm f/4.5-6.3 lens is a perfect match for vlo

title: SONY a6700 Mirrorless Camera with E PZ 16-50 mm f/3.5–5.6 OSS II Lens
subtitle: SONY a6700 Mirrorless Camera
overview: Light up your feeds with the help of the Sony a6700. As you'd expect from Sony, it's a master at low light photography thanks to a 26-megapixel Exmor R sensor and BIONZ XR processor. Images are consistently sharp with accurate colours. For those fleeting moments, let the AI-powered autofocus do its thing. It can recognise subjects, such as people, birds, insects, and even cars or trains, and locks on focus, even as they are moving. That frees you up to focus on framing that award-winning shot. Sony have cherry-picked some of the best features from their Cinema Line cameras, including 4K video downsampled from 6K up to 30 fps. Your footage will look stunning, even at higher frame rates. You can also play around with 4K slow-mo up to 120 fps for action replays, cinema profiles for natural colours, and AI-based Real-time Tracking that keeps your subject in focus.Good to know- Capture a bird mid-flight or a wave crashing on rocks thanks to a speedy 11 fps continuous shooting- Pick from 10

title: CANON EOS R50 Mirrorless Camera with RF-S 18-45 mm f/4.5-6.3 IS STM Lens
subtitle: CANON EOS R50 Mirrorless
overview: Standout in your videos – not on the street. The Canon EOS R50 is small enough to be discreet and light enough to carry around anywhere. Shoot vlogs on the fly or get creative with a timelapse. The R50 has a few tricks up its sleeve too. It's smart enough to know when it's shooting vertical or horizontal – super handy for livestreaming. Creative bracketing gives you multiple edits for each image you take. The camera does all the hard work - just choose your favourite effect. And with a vari-angle touchscreen, you can work all the angles. Creating new content has never been so easy.Good to know- Its Dual Pixel CMOS AF II recognises and tracks subjects super quickly for reliable focusing- It can capture bursts of up to 15 fps while keeping the subject sharply in focus - then it's just a case of picking the best shot- Powered by the DIGIC X processor, the camera is quick to focus and take the shot- It uses 6K oversampling to give you uncropped 4K videos packed with detail- Built-in WiFi m

title: SONY ZV-E10 II Mirrorless Vlogging Camera with 16-50 mm f/3.5-5.6 Lens
subtitle: SONY ZV-E10 II Mirrorless
overview: Make your content stand out from the crowd with the Sony ZV-E10 II camera. You've got 26 megapixels to play with on the APS-C Exmor R CMOS sensor. It captures plenty of light and keeps noise to a minimum, even when you're shooting in challenging conditions. So, you won't need to rely so heavily on artificial lighting for your vlogs. It's nice and speedy too thanks to the BIONZ XR processing engine. For video that's packed with detail, you can shoot 4K footage at up to 120 fps, oversampled from 6K. With 10-bit 4:2:2 colour sampling, S-Log 3 Picture Profile and XAVC S-I (All-Intra) formats, you've got plenty of flexibility to make tweaks in the editing suite. And when time isn't on your side, this camera has a few tricks up its sleeve. You can create the mood you want in-camera with 10 Creative Look presets. The Cinematic Vlog settings can be used to enhance skin tones or emphasise specific colours for a professional look.Good to know- Freeze frame action and pick the best shot of the bu

title: FUJIFILM X-T5 Mirrorless Camera with FUJINON XF 16-50 mm f/2.8-4 R LM WR Lens - Silver
subtitle: FUJIFILM X-T5 Mirrorless Camera
overview: The Fujifilm X-T5 is a gorgeous combination of timeless, classic design and Fuji's imaging expertise. On top, you'll find traditional analogue control dials, so you can make precise exposure adjustments while framing. The robust, weather-sealed body means you won't need to keep it hidden away when faced with the elements. And the image spec is just as solid as the build. You've got 40-megapixels to play with which is ideal for poster prints or deep cropping. Inspired by film, the X-Trans CMOS 5 HR processor cleverly boosts resolution while keeping noise in a minimum. It's super speedy too with the X-Processor 5 on board. It's twice as fast as the previous-gen processor without being power hungry, so it won't eat up your battery life.Good to know- The 3-way tilting LCD screen makes it easy to frame from tricky and unique angles- Shoot handheld with confidence thanks to the 5-axis in-body image stabilisation (IBIS) system- Recreate the look of classic photographic film, including Astia,

title: CANON EOS R50 V Mirrorless Camera Creator Kit with RF-S 14-30 mm f/4-6.3 IS STM PZ Lens
subtitle: CANON EOS R50 V
overview: Shooting solo can be tricky, but with the Canon EOS R50 V, it's a piece of cake. Adjust your settings using the vari-angle touchscreen, then simply press the front record button to start filming. The tally light lets you know when you're recording. The 24-megapixel sensor delivers sharp 4K video, oversampled from 6K for added detail. Subject detection autofocus and Movie Digital IS makes sure you stay sharp and in focus, even as you move. Plus, the dedicated tripod mount lets you easily switch to vertical content.Good to know- With the included Canon RF-S 14-30 mm f/4-6.3 lens you'll get smooth footage thanks to advanced stabilisation technology- This kit comes with a tripod grip, SD card, and stereo microphone, so you can get shooting straight out the box- You can achieve your desired look in-camera with customisable picture styles and colour filters- Shoot in Canon Log 3 to fine-tune the colours, brightness and contrast in post-production- You can capture fluid slow motion with Full

title: SONY E 70-350 mm f/4.5-6.3 G OSS Telephoto Zoom Lens
subtitle: SONY E 70-350 mm
overview: From sweeping landscapes to elusive wildlife, this Sony 70-350 mm telephoto zoom lens gives you the reach to capture it all. The wide zoom range is equivalent to 105–525 mm on a full-frame camera. With one aspherical and three ED glass elements, you'll get crisp, clear shots across the zoom range, even at super-telephoto lengths. Plus, the circular aperture design delivers smooth, creamy bokeh - perfect for portraits and isolating subjects.Good to know- Built-in Optical SteadyShot stabilisation keeps your images sharp and blur-free, even when zoomed right in- Sony's XD Linear Motor offers lightning-fast autofocus for capturing tricky subjects like birds or sports- The focus hold button is customisable, so can be used for functions like left/right eye select- The zoom lock prevents annoying lens creep when you're on the move

title: NIKON Z5II Mirrorless Camera with NIKKOR Z 24-200 mm f/4-6.3 VR Lens
subtitle: NIKON Z5II Mirrorless Camera
overview:
The Nikon Z5II Mirrorless Camera is designed to keep up with the action. Autofocus is smart and quick. It recognises subjects across nine categories for both photos and video, then locks on and tracks. It even keeps up with unpredictable subjects like kids and pets. With the EXPEED 7 engine and a back-illuminated full-frame sensor, the Z5II delivers clear, detailed images when the lights are low. Perfect for cafés, aquariums and night streets. The fast-focusing 24–200 mm zoom lens delivers a beautiful bokeh. Lightweight and weather-sealed, it's ready for adventures and is small enough to fit in your bag.
Good to know
- Pick from creator-approved Imaging Recipes and apply them straight from the Picture Control button
- Build custom colour styles in Nikon NX Studio, then send them to the camera to use anytime
- In-body stabilisation (5-axis IBIS) helps keep handheld shots crisp
- You can switch focus modes automatically (AF-A) without diving into menus
- A bright 3000-nit EVF helps you c
